items.title: Pre-World Cup friendlies - Messi rested & Leao sent off
items.summary: Argentina great Lionel Messi is rested against Honduras, while Brazil, Germany, Belgium and Portugal each win warm-up games prior to the World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: England v New Zealand: first cricket Test, day four – live
items.summary: Live over-by-over updates from 11am UK time Lord’s pitch is one of cricket’s great mysteries You can email Tim with your thoughts On Sky, Mike Atherton has been chairing a chat...
